justification: The diff correctly upgrades Spring Boot to 3.x and Java to 21, migrating javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence and removing deprecated SpringExtension/MockitoSettings. However, it only uses one Java 21 idiom (List.getFirst() on line 53 of AddressRepositoryTest) and introduces a potential issue by removing SpringExtension from @ExtendWith in AddressRepositoryTest and AddressServiceTest while keeping @SpringBootTest, which might break context loading since SpringBoot 3.x relies on @ExtendWith(SpringExtension.class) implicitly or explicitly depending on configuration, though @SpringBootTest usually handles it. The removal of @MockitoSettings is good for modern Mockito. The diff is coherent but lacks deeper Java 21 modernization beyond the single List.getFirst() call.
